title: True Bamboo
body:
Also available at [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/true-bamboo)

This resource pack creates a more realistic look by hollowing out any kind of bamboo and drilling holes.
Seeing many variety of 竹(bamboo) in Japan, I wondered why the bamboo in Minecraft were flat with no holes, and I thought I should fix that, so I created this resource pack, "True Bamboo". Enjoy :)

**Requires Optifine to work correctly.**

Suggest & Report is available on [forms](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScXEKcnsnqm1HhNYOXSzqnNskYxUEwBOY-OqhljM_kHqV8Jmg/viewform?usp=sf_link) and [Discord](https://discord.gg/uTDu7K3Ezn)
